author: O22C
content: Completed: Added .github/workflows/ci.yml with three jobs (test, clippy, fmt) on ubuntu-latest pinned to Rust 1.87 via dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable. Used Swatinem/rust-cache@v2 on test/clippy. Triggers: push to main, pull_request. README CI badge added. All three commands verified to pass locally before committing. Commit 08252c7. Hook-config.json had unrelated kickoff-tooling config normalizations (auto_steal_stale_locks string->bool, removed flat-namespace duplicate keys); left uncommitted as out of scope for #34.
